reason: The setting controls the number of password retry prompts per session, a standard PAM password policy adjustment that does not affect system boot, networking, or critical services. Adjusting this value follows STIG hardening patterns and carries negligible risk of lockout if set within policy limits.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Setting retry too low may temporarily lock users out of a session, but this is a normal password policy risk and can be mitigated by policy compliance.
